label: Suspicious Port Activity
summary: Unusual assembly of heavy equipment near the primary container terminal. Cargo identity unverified.

label: Asset Contact: Bravo Hotel
summary: Asset reported observation of two suspected handlers meeting at a known transit point. Exchange of documents confirmed.

label: Logistics Hub Expansion
summary: Structural expansion of a private warehouse facility not listed in municipal records. Thermal signatures indicate cooling systems.

label: Encrypted Sync Burst
summary: Detection of short-duration encrypted RF burst originating from the city center. Frequency hop pattern detected.

label: Supply Chain Diversion
summary: Diversion of a high-value electronics shipment reported by a facility manager. Tracking unit disabled at 0400h.
